metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from her hand. It fell to the floor. It broke into many pieces. She swept them up carefully.

The dark storm clouds gathered ominously in the late afternoon sky. Heavy rain began pouring down across the city soon after. The busy streets quickly flooded with deep pools of muddy water. Cars struggled to drive safely through the dangerous mess on the roads.

He placed the slices of whole wheat bread into the toaster. He pushed the small lever down firmly to begin the process. The golden toast popped up automatically a few minutes later. He spread rich yellow butter evenly over the warm bread slices.

She planted a tiny tomato seed deep in the moist dirt. She watered the garden pot every single sunny morning before work. A small green sprout finally emerged from the dark brown soil. The healthy plant eventually grew several beautiful red tomatoes for her.

The energetic dog spotted a gray squirrel in the backyard grass. It barked loudly and chased the small animal across the lawn. The frightened squirrel quickly ran up the tall wooden oak tree. The dog sat at the bottom waiting patiently for it to return.

The head chef chopped the fresh organic vegetables on the counter. He tossed the chopped pieces into the extremely hot frying pan. He stirred the sizzling mixture continuously with a large wooden spoon. He served the delicious hot meal on a clean white plate.

The loud alarm clock rang sharply at six in the morning. She reached out her arm and hit the rectangular snooze button. She finally climbed out of her warm and comfortable sleeping bed. She walked slowly to the bathroom sink to wash her tired face.

The young boy threw his baseball high over the wooden fence. The flying ball landed right in the angry neighbor's flower garden. He bravely climbed the tall fence to retrieve his lost toy. The cranky neighbor yelled loudly at him to get out immediately.

The professional baker mixed the white flour and sugar together thoroughly. He kneaded the sticky dough with his hands for ten minutes. He placed the heavy bread loaf into the preheated commercial oven. The freshly baked bread smelled absolutely delicious at the very end.

The experienced hiker walked steadily up the steep and rocky mountain trail. He felt very physically tired after hiking for several long hours. He sat down carefully on a large gray rock to rest. He drank some refreshing cold water from his shiny metal canteen.

The white snow started falling heavily late in the winter evening. It completely covered the local roads with a thick frosty blanket. The massive snowplows came out quickly to clear the dangerous streets. Traffic moved very slowly the next morning due to the icy conditions.

She turned on the bright desk lamp in her dark bedroom. She opened her heavy science textbook to the newly assigned chapter. She read the confusing academic paragraphs several times over for clarity. She finally understood the complex biological concept completely after studying hard.

The curious cat jumped suddenly onto the clean kitchen counter top. It accidentally knocked over a completely full glass of cold milk. The white liquid spilled everywhere across the expensive hardwood kitchen floor. The guilty cat quickly ran away to hide quietly upstairs.

The strict teacher handed out the incredibly difficult modern history test. The anxious students picked up their newly sharpened yellow wooden pencils. They wrote their test answers on the blank paper very quietly. The teacher collected the finished written exams exactly one hour later.

He inserted the brass metal key into the heavy front door lock. He confidently turned the metal key completely to the right side. He pushed the heavy wooden front door open very slowly and carefully. He stepped quietly inside the dark and completely silent empty house.

The strong wind blew very hard across the sandy tropical beach. It violently pushed the massive ocean waves toward the coastal shore. The powerful waves crashed loudly against the tall rocky granite cliffs. The salty ocean spray flew high into the cloudy gray air.

She poured the boiling hot water into her favorite ceramic mug. She immediately added a fragrant herbal tea bag to the hot water. She let the calming tea steep undisturbed for exactly five minutes. She took a slow and careful sip of the warm comforting drink.

The experienced mechanic opened the metal hood of the completely broken car. He carefully inspected the incredibly dirty engine looking for obvious problems. He successfully replaced the old fouled spark plugs with brand new ones. The repaired vehicle finally started very smoothly on the first try.

The hardworking farmer plowed the large empty field with his green tractor. He carefully planted the yellow corn seeds in perfectly straight parallel rows. He sprayed fertilizer onto the dark soil to help the plants grow. The healthy corn grew incredibly tall and bright yellow by late summer.

The talented painter dipped his wide brush deeply into the blue paint. He expertly applied a thick colorful coat to the blank living room wall. He patiently waited two full hours for the wet paint to completely dry. He applied a second thin coat for much better overall color coverage.

She walked happily into the incredibly busy neighborhood grocery store. She carefully placed fresh green apples into her metal shopping cart. She paid the friendly smiling cashier at the front checkout register. She carried the heavy paper grocery bags safely to her parked car.

The competitive runner sprinted rapidly toward the final painted finish line. He successfully crossed the white athletic tape just before the other racers. The massive crowd cheered incredibly loudly for his amazing track victory. He happily received a shiny gold medal for winning the competitive race.

The bright orange sun slowly set below the distant western horizon. The beautiful evening sky quickly turned brilliant shades of pink and purple. The sparkling bright stars gradually appeared in the extremely dark night sky. The noisy crickets began chirping loudly in the tall green meadow grass.

He accidentally dropped his incredibly expensive mobile phone on the concrete pavement. The fragile glass screen severely cracked right down the exact middle. He nervously picked up the broken electronic device to check the physical damage. He sadly realized the severe destruction of the completely shattered phone.

She wrote a deeply heartfelt personal letter to her distant best friend. She carefully placed the folded white paper into a standard mailing envelope. She securely stuck a colorful postage stamp in the top right corner. She dropped the sealed personal letter into the blue public mailbox outside.

The strong lumberjack swung his incredibly sharp steel axe at the tree. He chopped quite deeply into the thick brown wooden tree trunk. The huge forest tree slowly tilted and eventually fell directly to the ground. He methodically cut the massive fallen branches into much smaller usable logs.

The tired newborn baby started crying loudly in the middle of the night. The exhausted mother picked him up from the comfortable wooden sleeping crib. She gently rocked him back and forth in her warm loving arms. The calm baby finally fell deeply asleep after roughly ten long minutes.

The performing stage magician showed the captive audience an empty black hat. He theatrically tapped the empty hat three times with his wooden magic wand. He reached his right hand very deep inside the completely dark hat. He triumphantly pulled out a fluffy white rabbit to everyone's absolute surprise.

She carefully packed her favorite vacation clothes into a large blue suitcase. She excitedly drove her personal car to the extremely busy international airport. She successfully boarded the commercial airplane after thoroughly passing through security screening. The massive passenger plane took off quickly into the cloudy gray sky.

The noisy emergency fire alarm blared incredibly loudly in the tall office building. The frightened employees walked safely down the concrete stairs in an orderly line. They quickly gathered outside together in the officially designated safe assembly area. The brave city firefighters arrived very quickly to inspect the completely empty building.
noncausal_texts: A violin is played with a bow. A flute is played by blowing air. A drum is played by striking it. A harp is played by plucking strings.

Pure copper conducts electricity extremely well in standard household wiring circuits. Solid gold remains highly resistant to tarnishing or chemical corrosion over time. Aluminum metal provides lightweight structural support for modern commercial aircraft frames. Iron reacts readily with environmental oxygen to form brittle reddish-brown rust.

Venus features a dense atmosphere composed primarily of carbon dioxide gas. Jupiter possesses a massive swirling storm known as the Great Red Spot. Mars contains deep surface canyons and exceptionally tall extinct shield volcanoes. Saturn displays prominent bright rings made of countless orbiting ice particles.

Tropical rainforests support an incredibly high diversity of terrestrial plant and animal species. Dry desert regions experience extremely low levels of annual precipitation throughout the year. Tundra ecosystems feature a permanent layer of frozen underground soil called permafrost. Temperate deciduous forests contain broadleaf trees that shed their foliage during autumn months.

A perfect square contains four straight sides of completely equal mathematical length. An equilateral triangle features three interior angles measuring exactly sixty degrees each. A perfect geometric circle consists of points equally distant from a central origin. A regular hexagon possesses exactly six straight external boundaries of equal dimension.

The human liver actively filters various harmful chemical toxins from the circulating bloodstream. The stomach utilizes strong acidic digestive juices to effectively break down consumed food. The pancreas produces essential insulin hormones to naturally regulate blood sugar levels. The kidneys continuously extract liquid waste products to produce yellow liquid urine.

The Japanese yen serves as the official national currency for the country of Japan. The European euro functions as the primary legal tender across many distinct European nations. The Mexican peso operates as the fundamental monetary unit within the Mexican economy. The British pound circulates as the standard financial currency throughout the United Kingdom.

Ultramarine pigment traditionally comes from finely ground blue lapis lazuli stones. Titanium dioxide powder creates an exceptionally bright and highly opaque white paint. Cadmium yellow provides a very strong and brilliantly warm yellow artistic hue. Burnt sienna earth yields a rich and natural reddish-brown organic color.

A violent tornado consists of a rapidly rotating column of destructive wind. Thick morning fog forms from atmospheric water vapor condensing near the ground. A severe blizzard features intensely falling snow combined with powerful freezing winds. Strong thunderstorm updrafts freeze atmospheric water droplets into solid icy hailstones.

A classic suspension bridge utilizes massive steel cables to support the central roadway. A traditional cantilever bridge features structural beams anchored firmly at only one end. A standard truss bridge employs connected triangular structural elements to bear heavy loads. A basic beam bridge relies strictly on rigid horizontal supports resting on vertical piers.

The Python programming language emphasizes highly readable syntax and simple code indentation. Structured Query Language provides standardized commands for managing large relational data databases. The JavaScript language enables interactive user features within standard internet web browsers. C++ offers programmers extensive manual control over underlying computer system memory resources.

Highly viscous volcanic lava cools with extreme physical rapidity to form obsidian. Sandstone develops from the gradual accumulation and cementation of tiny mineral sand grains. Naturally occurring limestone undergoes intense underground geological heat and pressure to become marble. Granite consists primarily of deeply crystallized quartz and tough feldspar mineral formations.

Elephants use their highly prehensile elongated trunks to carefully grasp physical objects. Kangaroos utilize their powerful hind legs to quickly leap across long physical distances. Bats navigate through absolute physical darkness utilizing sophisticated biological echolocation sound waves. Beavers continuously construct massive wooden dams across flowing freshwater forest streams.

The Atlantic Ocean separates the coastal landmasses of the Americas from Western Europe. The Arctic Ocean contains expansive sheets of floating sea ice near the North Pole. The Pacific Ocean covers a massive portion of the Earth's total global surface. The Indian Ocean borders the distinctly diverse southern coastlines of the Asian continent.

The human femur functions as the longest and strongest bone in the body. The protective cranium tightly encloses and physically shields the fragile human brain tissue. The sternum anchors the protective rib cage firmly in the center of the chest. The human mandible constitutes the only freely movable bone within the entire skull.

Cirrus clouds consist almost entirely of microscopic ice crystals suspended at high altitudes. Cumulus clouds display distinctively fluffy and highly recognizable bright white cotton-like visual appearances. Stratus clouds typically form completely uniform gray atmospheric layers across the visible sky. Cumulonimbus clouds frequently produce intensely severe electrical thunderstorms and incredibly heavy localized rainfall.

The towering giant sequoia holds the record for the most massive living tree species. Weeping willow trees typically feature long drooping branches that hang low toward the ground. The resilient baobab tree stores immense quantities of water inside its incredibly thick trunk. Birch trees possess distinctively thin and highly recognizable peeling white exterior bark.

Chess requires two competing players to strategically move varied pieces across a checkered board. Scrabble involves constructing interconnected English words using randomly drawn physical letter tiles. Backgammon relies heavily on the random outcome of rolling two standard six-sided dice. Monopoly tasks players with aggressively purchasing simulated properties to bankrupt their opposing opponents.

A standard microwave oven utilizes high-frequency electromagnetic radiation to quickly heat food items. A mechanical dishwasher sprays fiercely hot soapy water to thoroughly clean dirty eating plates. A conventional refrigerator employs a continuous chemical cooling cycle to preserve perishable food goods. A food processor uses rapidly spinning metal blades to efficiently chop raw vegetable ingredients.

Geothermal energy harnesses naturally occurring intense heat from deep beneath the Earth's crust. Solar power relies entirely on capturing abundant light radiation emitted by the sun. Wind energy converts the natural physical movement of atmospheric air into usable mechanical power. Hydroelectric facilities generate electrical current by utilizing the immense force of flowing river water.

Cubism breaks down completely recognizable subjects into heavily fractured and entirely abstract geometric forms. Impressionism emphasizes accurately capturing the changing visual qualities of natural environmental light. Surrealism frequently presents bizarre and deeply illogical scenes inspired by unconscious human dreams. Pointillism utilizes countless tiny individual dots of pure color to form a complete image.

The complex human olfactory system detects widely varying chemical odor molecules in the air. The delicate auditory nerve securely transmits complex sound frequency signals directly to the brain. Specialized gustatory receptor cells allow humans to clearly perceive sweet and salty physical tastes. The biological visual system relies on light-sensitive photoreceptor cells located within the eye's retina.

Spaghetti features a completely solid and highly recognizable long cylindrical physical noodle shape. Penne consists of short hollow pasta tubes cut precisely at a sharp diagonal angle. Lasagna utilizes very broad and entirely flat rectangular pasta sheets for heavily layered baked dishes. Fusilli takes the distinct physical form of tightly wound short helical pasta spirals.

The continent of Australia contains vast expanses of entirely arid interior desert landscapes. South America heavily features the massive and incredibly biodiverse Amazonian tropical river basin. Antarctica remains completely covered by an immensely thick and permanent sheet of frozen ice. Africa physically straddles the global equator to encompass extremely diverse climatic environmental zones.

Natural silk fibers uniquely originate from the completely spun protective cocoons of certain insect larvae. Denim fabric typically utilizes a remarkably sturdy and highly durable cotton twill weaving pattern. Linen material comes directly from the processed interior fibers of the versatile flax plant. Synthetic polyester cloth strongly resists natural biological shrinking and common physical surface wrinkling.

An authentic espresso consists of a highly concentrated and uniquely thick shot of brewed coffee. A traditional cappuccino contains precisely equal distinct parts of espresso and thick steamed milk foam. A standard Americano heavily dilutes a strong espresso shot with plain hot boiling water. A classic mocha brilliantly combines dark chocolate syrup with strong espresso and warm steamed milk.

Penguins utilize their uniquely modified stiff wings essentially as highly efficient aquatic swimming flippers. Owls possess exceptionally large forward-facing eyes to clearly hunt prey in almost total darkness. Hummingbirds can uniquely hover completely motionless in mid-air by rapidly beating their tiny wings. Ostriches rely entirely on their incredibly powerful long legs to run at extremely high speeds.

The internal combustion engine efficiently generates the primary physical power to propel the vehicle. The transmission system mechanically regulates the transfer of kinetic energy to the rotating drive wheels. The suspension framework utilizes specialized metal springs to effectively absorb harsh physical road bumps. The braking mechanism creates immense physical friction to safely halt the rapidly moving heavy automobile.

The European Alps permanently stretch across several distinct nations including Switzerland and northern Italy. The Himalayas completely contain the extremely tall and globally famous Mount Everest geographical peak. The North American Rocky Mountains effectively divide the vast central plains from the western coastal regions. The Andes form a massive continuous highland chain strictly along South America's western coastline.

A rigid lever firmly pivots around a completely fixed and entirely stationary mechanical fulcrum point. A physical pulley cleverly utilizes a grooved spinning wheel and a long continuous flexible rope. An inclined plane basically consists of a completely flat surface set at a specific angle. A mechanical wedge rapidly separates tight physical objects by applying immense outward lateral physical force.
